Title: The rise of CLAVATA: evidence for CLAVATA3 and WOX signaling in the fern gametophyte

Regulation_Genes.Protein_Family_or_Domain: CLAVATA3/EMBRYO SURROUNDING REGION (CLE) family peptide precursor
Regulation_Genes.Subcellular_Localization: Secreted extracellular peptide (inferred from CLE peptide function)
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Source_Species: Expressed in the marginal meristem and newly produced daughter cells of hermaphrodite gametophytes; also in developing antheridia but absent from mature antheridia; decreases after fertilization
Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Detected at 7, 10, and 13 dpp in gametophytes; localized to marginal meristem/lobe and developing antheridia; strongly reduced at 14–36 h post-fertilization
Regulation_Genes.Regulatory_Effect_on_Target_Genes: Exogenous CrCLV3 peptide downregulates CrWOXA, CrWOXB, CrWOX13A, and endogenous CrCLV3; direct/downstream-independent repression is supported for CrWOXA during 8–10 dpp and for CrCLV3 during 6–8 and 8–10 dpp
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Peptide-mediated signaling leading to transcriptional repression/feedback regulation
Regulation_Genes.Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation: Negative feedback supported: CrCLV3 peptide downregulates endogenous CrCLV3 expression, including under cycloheximide treatment
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: Developmental stage of gametophyte meristem; fertilization decreases CrCLV3 expression; exogenous CrCLV3 peptide dosage
Regulation_Genes.Protein_Complex_Involvement: Putative CLE receptor complex with CLV1/BAM-type receptor homologs and co-receptors was discussed but not experimentally validated
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Promotes cell proliferation and stem cell identity in the gametophyte marginal meristem; promotes antheridium formation timing; exogenous peptide inhibits archegonium formation and can induce double meristems
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RNAi knockdown lines; synthetic peptide dosage and pulse-dosing; RT-qPCR; whole-mount in situ hybridization; aniline blue staining of meristem cells; phenotyping of cell and gametangium numbers; cycloheximide assay
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: Synthetic CrCLV3 peptide treatment (100 nM, 500 nM, 1 µM); pulse-dosing windows 0–8, 6–8, and 8–10 dpp; fertilization; cycloheximide co-treatment
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: RNAi construct promoter NA; native promoter discussed as 2 kb upstream region only
Regulation_Genes.Potential_Tradeoffs: Exogenous CrCLV3 peptide suppresses archegonium formation and reduces reproductive organ development while expanding meristematic growth
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: This is a developmental signaling study in fern gametophytes, not a nutrient metabolism paper; CrCLV3 was the principal experimentally characterized core gene
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. CrCLV3 is the fern CLE most similar to Arabidopsis CLV3 and is expressed in the gametophyte marginal meristem and developing antheridia. 2. RNAi knockdown reduces cell proliferation and delays gametangium formation, showing CrCLV3 positively promotes meristematic growth. 3. Exogenous CrCLV3 peptide increases meristem cell proliferation, widens the meristem, induces double meristems, and inhibits archegonium formation. 4. CrCLV3 signaling downregulates endogenous CrCLV3 and CrWOXA, providing evidence for CLE–WOX signaling in fern gametophytes.

Regulation_Genes.Expression_Pattern_of_Applied_Species: Detected in 7 and 10 dpp hermaphrodite gametophyte meristem; downregulated by long-term CrCLV3 peptide treatment and during 8–10 dpp peptide treatment with CHX
Regulation_Genes.Regulation_Mode: Likely transcriptional regulation, but downstream targets were not established in this paper
Regulation_Genes.Feedback_or_Feedforward_Regulation: Possible CLE–WOX signaling relationship proposed; feedback from CrWOXA to CrCLV3 not tested
Regulation_Genes.Upstream_Signals_or_Inputs: CrCLV3 peptide signaling during the 8–10 dpp developmental window
Regulation_Genes.Core_Phenotypic_Effect: Associated with female gametangium/archegonium developmental regulation downstream of CrCLV3 signaling
Regulation_Genes.Core_Validation_Method: RT-qPCR after CrCLV3 peptide treatment; cycloheximide assay; in situ hybridization showing meristem expression
Regulation_Genes.Environment_or_Treatment_Factor: 1 µM CrCLV3 peptide from 0–13 dpp; 1 µM CrCLV3 peptide pulse from 8–10 dpp; 10 µM cycloheximide co-treatment
Regulation_Genes.Applied_Promoters: Native promoter previously defined; no transgenic promoter assay reported here
Regulation_Genes.Other_Important_Info: Evidence supports CrWOXA as a direct or near-direct CrCLV3-responsive gene specifically during the later developmental window linked to archegonium inhibition, not during the earlier meristem proliferation window
Regulation_Genes.Summary_Key_Findings_of_Core_Gene: 1. CrWOXA is expressed in the gametophyte meristem. 2. CrWOXA is significantly downregulated by CrCLV3 peptide after long-term treatment. 3. During the 8–10 dpp window, CrWOXA repression persists in the presence of cycloheximide, supporting a direct/primary response to CrCLV3 signaling. 4. The data link CrWOXA to CLE-mediated control of female gametangium development in fern gametophytes.
